prikbord.title: Notice board
prikbord.error_save: Could not save. Please try again.
prikbord.error_blocked: Your message could not be posted due to inappropriate content.

placeholders.go: E.g: Tomorrow 10am at the launch. Who's in?
placeholders.report: E.g: 19kn NW, wide beach, not busy.
placeholders.tip: E.g: Watch out for rocks on the left at low tide.
placeholders.warning: E.g: North car park closed until March 12.
placeholders.question: E.g: Anyone know a good repair shop nearby?
